ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plugins" (
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plugin */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the plugin */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the plugin */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the plugin was first released */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the plugin was last updated */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the plugin's icon */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the plugin */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings for the plugin */,
  "author_url" TEXT /* URL of the plugin author's website */,
  "donation_url" TEXT /* URL for donating to the plugin author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* GitHub URL of the developer */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the plugin */,
  "trend_24h" INTEGER /* 24-hour trend of the plugin's ranking */,
  "trend_7d" INTEGER /* 7-day trend of the plugin's ranking */,
  "total_downloads" INTEGER /* Total downloads of the plugin */,
  "active_installs" INTEGER /* Active installs of the plugin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_rankings_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone entry */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "target_ranking" INTEGER /* Target ranking for the milestone */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., achieved, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_milestones_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_installs" (
  "install_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each install entry */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date of the install data */,
  "install_count" INTEGER /* Number of active installs for the plugin */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the plugin's installs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("install_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_installs_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, marketer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email address is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_feedback_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the plugin */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  " Compatible_WP_version" TEXT /* Compatible WordPress version for the plugin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_versions_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download entry */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date of the download data */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the plugin */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_downloads_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., admin, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_tags_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_faqs" (
  "faq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FAQ */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question in the FAQ */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question in the FAQ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_faqs_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)
